info.title: Slack
info.description: Subset of the Slack Web API covering users and conversations.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: User ID to get info on.

parameters.name: include_locale
parameters.description: Set to true to receive the locale for this user.

get.summary: List all users in a Slack team

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of items to return.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor for the next page of results.

parameters.name: include_locale
parameters.description: Set to true to receive the locale for users.

get.summary: Fetch a conversation's history of messages and events

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: Conversation ID to fetch history for.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of items to return.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor for the next page of results.

parameters.name: oldest
parameters.description: Only messages after this Unix timestamp will be included.

parameters.name: latest
parameters.description: Only messages before this Unix timestamp will be included.

get.summary: List all channels in a Slack team

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of items to return.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor for the next page of results.

parameters.name: types
parameters.description: Mix of channel types to include, comma separated.

parameters.name: exclude_archived
parameters.description: Set to true to exclude archived channels.

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: Conversation ID to learn more about.

parameters.name: include_locale
parameters.description: Set to true to receive the locale for this conversation.

parameters.name: include_num_members
parameters.description: Set to true to include the member count for the channel.

post.summary: Send a message to a channel

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: Channel, private group, or IM channel to send message to.

parameters.name: text
parameters.description: The formatted text of the message to be published.

parameters.name: thread_ts
parameters.description: Provide another message's ts value to make this a reply.

get.summary: List custom emoji for a team

parameters.name: include_categories
parameters.description: Set to true to return a list of emoji categories.

post.summary: Upload or create a file (deprecated, heavy multipart)

parameters.name: channels
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of channel names or IDs where the file will be shared.

parameters.name: filename
parameters.description: Filename of file.

get.summary: List users on a workspace (Enterprise Grid admin scope)

parameters.name: team_id
parameters.description: The ID of the team.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Limit for how many users to be retrieved per page.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Set cursor to next_cursor returned by the previous call.

post.summary: Exchange a temporary OAuth verifier code for an access token

parameters.name: code
parameters.description: The code param returned via the OAuth callback.

parameters.name: redirect_uri
parameters.description: This must match the originally submitted URI (if one was sent).

post.summary: Set the user profile photo / avatar

parameters.name: crop_w
parameters.description: Width/height of crop region (always square), in pixels.

parameters.name: crop_x
parameters.description: X coordinate of top-left corner of crop region.

parameters.name: crop_y
parameters.description: Y coordinate of top-left corner of crop region.
